name: Backblaze B2
description: Backblaze B2 is a low-cost cloud object storage service. The API allows you to create buckets, upload and download files, list bucket contents, manage application keys, and handle large file uploads at a fraction of the cost of other cloud providers.

capabilities.name: authorize_account
capabilities.description: Authorize with B2 to get an authorization token and API URL for subsequent calls.

capabilities.name: buckets_create
capabilities.description: Create a new storage bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_list
capabilities.description: List all buckets in your account.

capabilities.name: buckets_update
capabilities.description: Update a bucket's settings.

capabilities.name: buckets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an empty bucket.

capabilities.name: files_get_upload_url
capabilities.description: Get a URL and token for uploading files to a bucket.

capabilities.name: files_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file to B2 using the URL from get_upload_url.

capabilities.name: files_download_by_id
capabilities.description: Download a file by its file ID.

capabilities.name: files_download_by_name
capabilities.description: Download a file by its name and bucket.

capabilities.name: files_list_names
capabilities.description: List file names in a bucket.

capabilities.name: files_list_versions
capabilities.description: List all versions of files in a bucket.

capabilities.name: files_get_info
capabilities.description: Get info about a specific file version.

capabilities.name: files_delete_version
capabilities.description: Delete a specific version of a file.

capabilities.name: files_hide
capabilities.description: Hide a file (mark as deleted without removing it).

capabilities.name: files_copy
capabilities.description: Copy a file to a new location within B2.

capabilities.name: large_files_start
capabilities.description: Start a large file upload session.

capabilities.name: large_files_get_upload_part_url
capabilities.description: Get a URL for uploading a part of a large file.

capabilities.name: large_files_upload_part
capabilities.description: Upload a part of a large file.

capabilities.name: large_files_finish
capabilities.description: Finish a large file upload by combining all parts.

capabilities.name: large_files_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a large file upload and delete all uploaded parts.

capabilities.name: large_files_list_parts
capabilities.description: List parts that have been uploaded for a large file.

capabilities.name: large_files_list_unfinished
capabilities.description: List all unfinished large file uploads in a bucket.

capabilities.name: large_files_copy_part
capabilities.description: Copy a part from an existing file to a large file upload.

capabilities.name: keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new application key.

capabilities.name: keys_list
capabilities.description: List all application keys.

capabilities.name: keys_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an application key.

capabilities.name: download_auth_get
capabilities.description: Get an authorization token for downloading files from a private bucket.
